# Quality

2 capabilities | 11 met / 11 total acceptance criteria

## Capabilities

### [Development Standards Enforcement](./development-standards.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 7/7 (all met)

Six skills enforce development standards automatically during workflows: TDD discipline, code quality, pattern enforcement, conventional commits, problem-first framing, and systematic debugging. Integration wiring verification added to /deliver (Phase 4) and /discern (checklist item 10).

### [Document Validation](./document-validation.md)
**Status:** active | **ACs:** 4/4 (all met)

Four validation scripts provide pre-commit quality checks for the document trail: YAML lint, schema validation, cross-reference integrity, and source-install sync detection.
